parameters.query:
with site_stats as (
  select
    s.id as site_id,
    s.site_name,
    s.owner_id,
    (select count(*) from attendance_log al where al.site_id = s.id and al.date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date) as attendance_days,
    (select count(*) from site_diary_log sd where sd.site_id = s.id and sd.date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date) as diary_count,
    (select count(*) from defect_log d where d.site_id = s.id and d.created_at::date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date) as defects_opened,
    (select count(*) from defect_log d where d.site_id = s.id and d.status = 'resolved' and d.verified_at::date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date) as defects_closed,
    (select count(*) from site_milestone m where m.site_id = s.id and m.status = 'completed' and m.signed_off_at::date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date) as milestones_completed
  from sites s
  where s.status = 'active'
)
select ss.site_name, p.phone_number as owner_phone, ss.attendance_days, ss.diary_count, ss.defects_opened, ss.defects_closed, ss.milestones_completed,
  to_char((date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date, 'DD Mon') as week_start,
  to_char((date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date, 'DD Mon YYYY') as week_end
from site_stats ss
join profiles p on p.id = ss.owner_id
where ss.attendance_days > 0 or ss.diary_count > 0 or ss.defects_opened > 0 or ss.defects_closed > 0 or ss.milestones_completed > 0;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "number": $json.owner_phone.replace(/\D/g, ''), "text": "📊 *Weekly Site Digest — " + $json.site_name + "*
" + $json.week_start + " - " + $json.week_end + "

• Attendance marks: " + $json.attendance_days + "
• New diary entries: " + $json.diary_count + "
• Defects opened: " + $json.defects_opened + "
• Defects closed: " + $json.defects_closed + "
• Milestones completed: " + $json.milestones_completed + "

Open Mutiso.AI for details." } }}
